Hero.title:
FORGE YOUR
FUTURE ON
SOLANA
Hero.description: The premier technical training ground for the next generation of Solana architects. Move from zero to production-ready with our hardware-accelerated curriculum.

Footer.description: The decentralized university for the Solana ecosystem. Owned by the students.

proofs.title: ON-CHAIN PROOFS
proofs.description: Every module you complete issues a non-transferable credential to your wallet. Build a cryptographically verifiable resume as you learn.

compiler.title: LIVE COMPILER
compiler.description: No environment setup required. Write, test, and deploy Solana programs directly in our browser-based IDE with real-time feedback.

beginner.title: SOLANA FUNDAMENTALS
beginner.description: Master the base layer. Accounts, transactions, and the Sealevel runtime.

intermediate.title: ANCHOR FRAMEWORK
intermediate.description: Rapid program development using the industry-standard Rust DSL.

advanced.title: PROTOCOL SECURITY
advanced.description: Audit techniques, common attack vectors, and invariant testing.

Lesson.errorNotFound: PROTOCOL ERROR: COURSE OR LESSON NOT FOUND

Newsletter.title: Newsletter
Newsletter.description: Get weekly technical updates and ecosystem opportunities delivered straight to your inbox.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Access your operator dashboard and continue your progress.

signup.title: Initialize Operator
signup.subtitle: Begin your journey as a distinguished Solana architect.
signup.web3NativeDesc: While you can initialize with social identity, true progression requires linking a secure Solana wallet operator.

shared.brandingDescLogin: The premier technical training ground for the next generation of Solana architects. Move from zero to production-ready with our hardware-accelerated curriculum.
shared.brandingDescSignup: Every module you complete issues a cryptographically verifiable proof of skill to your wallet. Build an unquestionable resume as you learn.
shared.accessProtocolDesc: Enter your email to sign in or create an account.

Onboarding.brandingDesc: Configure your profile to join the Solana builder network. Each step unlocks access to the full Academy protocol.

step1.title: Your Identity
step1.subtitle: Set your operator display name. This is how you'll appear on the leaderboard and profile.

step2.title: Neural Signature
step2.subtitle: Your digital identity is procedurally initialized. You can reroll your unique signature until it reaches optimal resonance.
step2.description: This signature serves as your unique operator ID across the Academy protocol.

step3.title: Your Profile
step3.subtitle: Tell the community who you are. All fields are optional.
step3.bioPlaceholder: Senior Solana architect. Building the decentralized future...

step4.title: Learning Path
step4.subtitle: Select the tracks you want to master. Choose at least one.

step5.title: Connect Wallet
step5.subtitle: Link a Solana wallet to receive on-chain credentials and XP. You can skip and connect later in settings.

profile.title: Operator Profile
profile.avatarHint: Avatar is pulled from your connected OAuth provider (Google / GitHub).
profile.bioPlaceholder: Senior Solana architect. Building the decentralized future...

account.title: Account & Auth
account.emailHint: Email is managed via your auth provider.
account.walletError: Error linking wallet. Make sure it isn't already attached to another account.

interface.title: Interface Prefs
interface.themeDesc: Toggle between Light and Dark core

01.title: 01 // PROTOCOL ACCEPTANCE
01.content: By accessing the Superteam Academy terminal, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you ('the Operator') and Superteam Academy regarding your access to and use of the protocol.

02.title: 02 // OPERATOR ELIGIBILITY
02.content: Access to this terminal is restricted to individuals who can form legally binding contracts under applicable law. By using the protocol, you represent and warrant that you meet all eligibility requirements.

03.title: 03 // NEURAL SIGNATURE & SECURITY
03.content: Superteam Academy utilizes cryptographic signatures for session management. You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality and security of your private keys and connected wallet. Any operations performed via your signature are deemed to be authorized by you.

04.title: 04 // INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
04.content: All curricula, code templates, and proprietary protocols within the Academy are protected by intellectual property laws. Users are granted a limited, non-exclusive license to use these materials for educational purposes only.

05.title: 05 // PROHIBITED OPERATIONS
05.content: Malicious exploitation of the protocol, automated scraping, or any attempt to circumvent gamification guards is strictly prohibited. Violation of these rules may result in permanent termination of your Operator ID.

06.title: 06 // ON-CHAIN FINALITY
06.content: Operations involving the Solana blockchain are subject to sub-second finality. Superteam Academy cannot reverse on-chain transactions, gas fees (SOL), or permanent credential issuances.

07.title: 07 // LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
07.content: Superteam Academy is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any losses resulting from software bugs, network congestion, or wallet misconfigurations.

08.title: 08 // TERMINATION OF ACCESS
08.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to the terminal at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other Operators.

01.title: 01 // DATA CATEGORIZATION
01.content: We collect two categories of data: (A) Public on-chain data associated with your wallet address, and (B) Operational metadata including session logs and level progression to facilitate the gamification engine.

02.title: 02 // USAGE PROTOCOLS
02.content: Collected data is processed to generate your global ranking, track curriculum progress, and issue verified credentials. We do not sell operator data to third-party entities.

03.title: 03 // CRYPTOGRAPHIC STORAGE
03.content: Sensitive profile data is stored using industry-standard encryption. Authentication is handled via Better Auth, ensuring your neural signature remains secure and decentralized.

04.title: 04 // ANALYTICS & MONITORING
04.content: To improve the UX, we utilize PostHog for event tracking and Sentry for error logging. These services gather anonymized operational data to help us optimize the terminal environment.

05.title: 05 // OPERATOR RIGHTS
05.content: You retain the right to export your operator data packet (.json) at any time via the system settings. You may also request the deletion of your off-chain profile metadata.

06.title: 06 // POLICY EVOLUTION
06.content: As the protocol scales, this Privacy Policy may evolve. Significant changes will be announced via the terminal's global broadcast system.
